name: TranslationRequestRegistrar

neutralConcepts: subscribes to AccountCreated with optional acceptLanguage (cross-flow from FLOW-01)
BCP-47 normaliser rejects malformed tags → no-op (CF-814)
enabledLocales mutation uses Set semantics — no duplicate entries

ironRules.rule: tenantId on every write reads from ALS.tenantContext — never from event payload.
If parseLocale(acceptLanguage) returns null, the service writes nothing and emits no event. No-op is correct.

keywords: translation request registrar AccountCreated acceptLanguage BCP-47 normalisation enabledLocales union i18n-translation FLOW-48
